raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (routing policy) and shows where the draft drifts from it (fixed threshold instead of learned router), proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (thresholded routing on other modalities) and articulates the delta (chest X-ray specifics).",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (future work on co-occurrence priors).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unclear cloud model details).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (routing policy) and shows where the draft drifts from it (fixed threshold instead of learned router), proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (thresholded routing on other modalities) and articulates the delta (chest X-ray specifics).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (future work on co-occurrence priors).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unclear cloud model details).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
